overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair walking through a futuristic dystopian city. The scene features towering skyscrapers, neon advertisements, heavy atmospheric haze, and bustling street life with pedestrians and vehicles. The character navigates from a crowded street corner across wide intersections and into an elevated pedestrian plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with crosswalk waiting area

events.description: camera pans upward to look at towering skyscrapers and overhead transit structures
camera pans back down to street level facing the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: standing at crosswalk corner among a crowd of pedestrians, looking up at the massive architecture

notable_agents.action: character with blue hair and white mesh shirt waiting at the crosswalk corner
child in green jacket standing with adults near the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall dark building with illuminated windows lining the street
overhead highway or monorail track spanning between skyscrapers
massive futuristic glass and steel towers disappearing into the haze
tall black pillar with white illuminated symbols and text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a busy street corner with a crowd waiting to cross. The camera pans up to reveal massive skyscrapers and overhead transit structures shrouded in haze, then returns to street level showing the dark concrete architecture and neon signage of this futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian crosswalk with yellow safety stripes

events.description: character begins walking across the wide yellow-striped crosswalk
blue sedan drives past on the right side of the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide intersection toward the building with the large teal neon sign

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: large teal neon sign reading 'softsys' on the building facade
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide street marked with bold yellow stripes, moving toward the building with the prominent 'softsys' neon sign. Vehicles pass by on the right as the perspective shifts from the starting corner toward the opposite sidewalk, with the massive skyscrapers now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with storefronts and digital advertising

events.description: turns right at the intersection corner, passing the softsys building
approaches metro station entrance with large red digital billboard visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts, turning the corner and heading toward the metro station

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying red and white graphics on building facade
covered station entrance with stairs leading underground and illuminated signage
large yellow utility truck parked near the station entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the city sidewalk, the character passes the softsys building and turns toward a metro station entrance. The environment features large digital billboards, parked vehicles, and the entrance to an underground transit system, with palm trees lining the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with escalators and greenery

events.description: ascends stairs from street level to elevated pedestrian plaza
reaches top of stairs and enters the open plaza area with benches and trees

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to an elevated pedestrian plaza, passing a child in red boots walking ahead

notable_agents.action: child in red boots and brown jacket walking ahead into the plaza

entered.detail: metal and glass escalator and stair structure leading to upper level
green and yellow benches arranged along the plaza walkway
entrance to underground passage with red glowing interior lighting
mature trees with dense foliage planted in the elevated plaza

segments.scene_description: The character ascends from street level to an elevated pedestrian plaza via stairs, leaving the traffic behind. The plaza features marble flooring, benches, trees, and a glowing entrance to an underground passage, with the environment becoming more sheltered and pedestrian-focused.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with digital billboards and seating areas

events.description: passes large curved digital billboard displaying red neon graphics
walks past seated NPCs on benches near the plaza edge

agents.ego_description: walking through the elevated plaza past benches and large digital advertisements, heading deeper into the pedestrian zone

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a green bench conversing near the plaza edge

entered.detail: large curved digital screen wrapping around building corner with red graphics
bright red neon sign shaped like lips with glowing vertical elements
small booth structure with illuminated blue vending machines

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through the spacious elevated plaza, passing by seated pedestrians on benches and massive digital billboards including a prominent red neon lip sign. The environment is a pedestrian-only zone with marble surfaces, trees, and futuristic advertising displays.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a crowded urban intersection into the depths of a neon-lit commercial district. It begins at a busy street corner, where the camera pans upward to reveal massive skyscrapers and overhead transit structures shrouded in haze before returning to the dark concrete and glowing signage of the street level. As the character crosses the wide road marked with bold yellow stripes, the perspective shifts away from the initial crowd and toward a building featuring a prominent softsys neon sign. The scene then expands along the opposite sidewalk, passing the softsys building and moving past large digital billboards and parked vehicles. Finally, the camera turns toward a metro station entrance, gliding past a line of palm trees that border the underground transit system.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character ascends from a noisy street level into a serene, elevated pedestrian plaza. It begins with the character climbing a set of stairs, leaving the chaotic city traffic behind to enter a sheltered space defined by marble flooring and manicured trees. As the camera follows the character further into the plaza, the environment opens up into a spacious pedestrian-only zone featuring benches and a glowing entrance to an underground passage. The scene then expands to reveal a landscape of futuristic advertising, passing by seated pedestrians and massive digital billboards, before finally centering on a prominent red neon lip sign towering over the marble walkway.
